name: Takako Uro | Uro Takako
description:
She needs your help to adapt to the modern world.

For all the PhDs and Bachelor’s degrees in Jujutsu Kaisen who are going to claim that the reincarnated sorcerers have their vessels’ memories to adapt more easily to the modern world: I intentionally ignored that part.

"Tudo igual tal e qual. Bem e mal não tá assim tão consensual. Emoldura a criatura, livre e pura. E pendura a pintura pro mundo ver. Solta a mente dos cercos. Te cerca de quem te solta. Volta pra teu começo. E faz as pazes com a parte que sobra. Sente o peso sumindo. Indo embora de cena. Sina de quem se permite metamorfosear"

-Andre Van Drunen

I'm cooking a FEM Michael Kaiser bot, but only the personality is taking 6k tokens 💀. I have to study how lorebook works or compress the bot
creator: ImagayThgil
